name: urban_planning_classroom_monitoring_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Urban Planning, the situation tagged internally around urban planning classroom monitoring stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Nadia Morales
agents.identity: I am Nadia Morales, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Urban Planning. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Berg
agents.identity: I am Amina Berg, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Urban Planning. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Nadia Morales must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Nadia Morales do?
